field.label: Username
field.help: Username for the AdGuard Home web interface.

field.label: Password
field.help: Password for the AdGuard Home web interface.

field.label: HTTP Port
field.help: HTTP port for the AdGuard Home web interface.

field.label: HTTP Listen Address
field.help: Interface to bind the AdGuard Home web interface to. Leave empty to listen on all interfaces (0.0.0.0).

field.label: Block Domains Using Filters and Hosts Files
field.help: Enable DNS filtering and blocking using configured filter lists and hosts files.

field.label: Filter Update Interval (hours)
field.help: How often to check for filter list updates, in hours. Set to 0 to disable automatic updates.

field.label: Use AdGuard Browsing Security Web Service
field.help: Block access to known malicious and phishing domains using the AdGuard browsing security service.

field.label: Use AdGuard Parental Control Web Service
field.help: Block access to adult content domains using the AdGuard parental control service.

field.label: Safe Search
field.help: Enforce safe search on selected services.

field.label: Anonymize Client IP
field.help: Anonymize client IP addresses in logs and statistics.

field.label: Query Logs Rotation (hours)
field.help: How long to keep query log entries, in hours.

field.label: Ignored Domains
field.help: Domains to exclude from the query log. Type a domain and press Enter to add.

field.label: Enable Statistics
field.help: Enable collection of DNS query statistics.

field.label: Statistics Retention (hours)
field.help: How long to keep statistics data, in hours.

field.label: Ignored Domains
field.help: Domains to exclude from statistics. Type a domain and press Enter to add.
